response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:45: ReGLOSS performs 'Kottkara' (SixTONES). 2. 01:46-02:04: Transition screen 'a few years later'. 3. 02:05-05:04: Ichijou Ririka performs 'Superstar' (Ayumu Imazu). 4. Lyrics for both songs were retrieved and verified.
response.global_summary: The video features two dance performances by VTubers: first, a performance of "Kottkara" by the group ReGLOSS, followed by a transition labeled "a few years later" and a performance of "Superstar" by the VTuber Ichijou Ririka.

scenes.description: ReGLOSS performs a dance cover of the song 'Kottkara'. The performers are in a dark, stage-like setting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Hey, boy 平凡にborn in the ニッポン 産声オギャー 行く先は荒野
ノーマル以下が如何にして 地下深く眠る鉱脈掘れますか？
知るか！伸るか反るかしかねぇ この世の中 確かな価値観など無価値か
カッとなったって この葛藤でうまれたtakeはcutできん yo
i can't be someone else, oh i know, i know…
このブレーキを壊したいの したいの
これだけじゃやれねぇってわかってる
でもこれしかねぇから これにかかってる
間違ってる未来でも 俺には光ってる
let it fire！
燃やすこの闘志 その鉄格子
ぶち壊し どうしようもないままが
自分なんだ こっから始まんだ
いつかの童心もって努力し
夢と相思相愛になれるはずなんだ
こっから、こっから始まんだ
1, 2, 3, 4 順番通り
行ってないだけで予定通り
ローリンローリン 転がってけ
よりどりみどりの一生
1, 2, 3, 4 順番通り
行ってないだけで予定通り
ローリンローリン 転がってけ yo
こっから始まんだ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, boy, born in ordinary Japan, first cry 'Ogyaa', destination is the wilderness.
How can a normal person dig up the mineral vein sleeping deep underground?
Who cares! It's life or death in this world, are conventional values worthless?
Even if I get angry, the take born from this conflict cannot be cut, yo.
I can't be someone else, oh I know, I know...
I want to break this brake, I want to.
I know I can't do it just with this.
But this is all I have, so I'm betting on this.
Even a mistaken future is shining to me.
Let it fire!
Burn this fighting spirit, break this iron bar,
Leaving it hopeless, that is myself, it starts from here.
With the childhood heart of some day, I'll put in the effort,
I should be able to become mutually in love with my dreams.
It starts from here, it starts from here...
1, 2, 3, 4, in order,
Just not going as planned, according to plan,
Rollin' rollin', keep rolling,
A life with many choices.
1, 2, 3, 4, in order,
Just not going as planned, according to plan,
Rollin' rollin', keep rolling, yo,
It starts from here.
